# Eka Developer Platform APIs

> Eka Care developer platform: APIs, SDKs, and integration guides for building healthcare applications on India's leading health network.

## Documentation

- [Get Started](https://developer.eka.care/user-guides/get-started): SIGN UP. BUILD. DEPLOY. 🚀
- [Eka Products](https://developer.eka.care/user-guides/eka-products): Explore all Eka platform products across Core EMR, Health AI, Interoperability, and MCP.
- [Assessments](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/health-ai/assessments): Structured capture of patient-reported health data across care journeys
- [EkaScribe](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/health-ai/ekascribe): Clinical and enterprise use cases for medical-grade speech-to-documentation APIs
- [MedAssist](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/health-ai/medassist): Agentic medical assistant for real-time medical conversations using medical LLMs
- [MCP for Indian treatment protocol searchs](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/mcp/MCP-for-Indian-treatment-protocol-search): India-specific drug, protocol, and pharmacology intelligence APIs
- [MCP for EMR](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/mcp/mcp-for-emr): Self-hosted MCP server bridging Eka.care APIs with LLM applications
- [Medical DB](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/general-tools/medical-db): Standardized medical reference database for structured clinical knowledge
- [Medical Document Parsing](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/general-tools/medical-document-parsing): Extract structured clinical data from lab report documents
- [ABDM](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/interoperability/abdm): Plug-and-play APIs to integrate healthcare systems with India's ABDM ecosystem
- [Patient](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/core-emr/patients): Patient profiles and demographic records within Core EMR
- [Doctor](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/core-emr/doctor): Medical professional profiles and availability within Core EMR
- [Appointment](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/core-emr/appointments): Scheduled patient–doctor interactions within Core EMR
- [Clinic](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/core-emr/clinic): Healthcare facility profiles within Core EMR
- [Payments](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/core-emr/payments): Financial transactions for patient services within Core EMR
- [Prescription](https://developer.eka.care/integrations/core-emr/prescription): Medical prescriptions and treatment instructions within Core EMR

## API Reference

- [Getting Started](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/getting-started)
- [Connect Login](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/client-login)
- [Connect Refresh](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/refresh-token-v2)
- [Delete Account](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/delete-account)
- [Oidc Verify](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/oidc-user-verify)
- [Oidc Refresh](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/oidc-user-refresh)
- [Python SDK](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/sdks/python-sdk): A Python SDK for interacting with Eka Care APIs.
- [Go SDK](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/sdks/go-sdk): A GO SDK for interacting with Eka Care APIs.
- [Java SDK](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/sdks/java-sdk): A Java Spring Boot SDK for interacting with Eka Care APIs.
- [Invite Flow](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/authorization/invite-flow)
- [Encrypted API Requests and Responses](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/end-to-end-encryption/guide): Guide for implementing end-to-end encryption using JWE for Eka Care APIs
- [Getting Started](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/connect/webhooks/getting-started)
- [Webhook Signature](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/connect/webhooks/webhook-signature)
- [Register Webhook](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/connect/webhooks/register-webhook)
- [Get Webhooks](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/connect/webhooks/get-webhooks)
- [Delete Webhook](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/connect/webhooks/delete-webhook)
- [Webhook Samples](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/connect/webhooks/webhook-samples)
- [Overview](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/overview)
- [Overview](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/assessment-flow/overview)
- [Initialize Assessment](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/assessment-flow/initialization/initialize-assessment)
- [Start Assessment](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/assessment-flow/continue/start-assessment)
- [Continue Assessment](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/assessment-flow/continue/continue-assessment)
- [Submit Assessment](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/assessment-flow/submit/submit-assessment)
- [Questionnaire_Data](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/questionnaire_data)
- [List All Components](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/component-info/list-all-components)
- [Fetch Assessment V2](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/fetch-assessment-v2)
- [Fetch Assessments By Id](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/fetch-assessments-by-id)
- [Python SDK](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/SDKs/ekapython-sdk): Eka Python SDK for assessment
- [TS SDK](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/SDKs/assessment-ts-sdk): Complete implementation guide for the Assessment TS SDK
- [Assessment Workflows](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/assessment-workflows)
- [Symptoms Dump](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/symptoms-dump)
- [Error Codes](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/error-codes)
- [↗️ Continue Assessment Request Format](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/assessment-flow/continue/continue-request-formats)
- [↙️ Continue Assessment Response Format](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/assessment/assessment-flow/continue/continue-response-formats)
- [Overview](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/overview)
- [System Requirements](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/System-Requirements)
- [Overview](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ekascribe-v2/overview)
- [Presigned URL](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ekascribe-v2/presigned-url)
- [File Upload Process](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ekascribe-v2/file-upload)
- [Start Transcription](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ekascribe-v2/init)
- [Transcription Result](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ekascribe-v2/result)
- [Python Sdk](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/SDKs/python-sdk)
- [Java Sdk](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/SDKs/java-sdk)
- [Android Sdk](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/SDKs/android-sdk)
- [Ios Sdk](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/SDKs/ios-sdk)
- [Ts Sdk](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/SDKs/TS-sdk)
- [Upload Voice](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ekascribe-v1/upload-voice)
- [Retrieve Result](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ekascribe-v1/retrieve-transcribe)
- [Audio Transcription](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/audio-transcription): Eka Care's ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) API for medical speech transcription converts spoken medical language into accurate text. It's designed to understand medical terminology, drug names, procedures, and diseases etc.
- [IP Allowlisting for Clients](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ip-allowlisting-for-clients): Allowlisting and endpoint information for Eka Scribe APIs & Audio transcription
- [Eka FHIR Structure](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/FHIR/Eka-FHIR-structure): FHIR resource mappings for Eka Care medical data
- [Ip Whitelisting For Clients](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/ekascribe/ip-whitelisting-for-clients)
- [MedAssist Agent](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/medassist/overview): MedAssist is a medical assistant agentic functionality that helps users communicate with our state of the art medical LLM for medical concerns and healthcare guidance.
- [Create Session](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/medassist/create-session)
- [Get Session](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/medassist/get-session)
- [Refresh Session Token](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/medassist/refresh-session)
- [WebSocket API](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/medassist/websocket): Real-time communication with MedAssist through WebSocket connection
- [TypeScript SDK](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/health-ai/medassist/typescript-sdk): Complete TypeScript SDK for MedAssist with configurable UI components
- [Drugs And Labs](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/medical-db/drugs-and-labs)
- [Symptoms And Diagnosis](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/medical-db/symptoms-and-diagnosis)
- [Introduction](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/general-tools/medical/lab-report/introduction)
- [Upload Report](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/general-tools/medical/lab-report/upload-report)
- [Parsed Report Result](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/general-tools/medical/lab-report/parsed-report-result): Use this API with the document_id to fetch results. This endpoint returns a JSON response that includes a detailed and structured parsed report.
- [Delete Document](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/general-tools/medical/lab-report/delete-document)
- [Python](https://developer.eka.care/SDKs/backend/report-parsing-sdk): A Python SDK for parsing medical documents using Eka Care APIs
- [Java](https://developer.eka.care/SDKs/backend/report-parsing-sdk-java): A Java Spring Boot SDK for parsing medical documents using Eka Care APIs
- [Smart Report Webhook](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/general-tools/medical/lab-report/smart-report-webhook)
- [Pii Webhook](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/general-tools/medical/lab-report/pii-webhook)
- [Classification Webhook](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/general-tools/medical/lab-report/classification-webhook)
- [Actors](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/Actors/actors)
- [Before You Begin](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/Instructions/before-you-begin)
- [Getting Started](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-registration-api/getting-started)
- [Add Patient To Directory](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-registration-api/add-patient-to-directory)
- [Search Patient By Mobile](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-registration-api/search-patient-by-mobile)

- [Update Patient Details Api](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-registration-api/update-patient-details-api)

- [Update Patient Details](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-directory-apis/update-patient-details)
- [Delete Patient](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-directory-apis/delete-patient)
- [Patients List Minified](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-directory-apis/patients-list-minified)
- [Retrieve Patients By Mobile](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-directory-apis/retrieve-patients-by-mobile)
- [Trinity Profiles SDK (TypeScript)](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/patient-directory-sdks/patient-directory-ts-sdk): Type-safe SDK for managing patient profiles through the Trinity API.

- [IP Allowlisting for Clients](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/doc-tool/ip-allowlisting-for-clients): Allowlisting and endpoint information to access Eka Care EMR
- [Overview](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/overview): Understand what ABDM is, who the key players are, and what you can build with EKA's ABDM Connect APIs and SDKs.
- [Milestone 1](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/flows/m1): ABHA Creation and Login flows for ABDM integration.
- [Milestone 2](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/flows/m2): Care Context Linking and Data Fetch flow for ABDM integration.
- [Milestone 3](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/flows/m3): Consent management and health data retrieval flow for ABDM integration.
- [Milestone 4](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/flows/m4): Healthcare Professional Registry (HPR), Health Facility Registry (HFR), and Onboarding flows for ABDM integration.
- [Overview](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/registration/intro)

- [ABHA card](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/profile/cards/abha-card)
- [Profile Details](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/profile/details/profile-details)
- [Update Profile](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/profile/details/update-profile): Name, gender and date of birth cannot be edited for a KYC verified ABHA
- [Delete Profile](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/profile/details/delete)

- [Get Linked CareContexts](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/care-contexts/records/records)
- [Care context linking](https://developer.eka.care/api-reference/user-app/abdm-connect/care-contexts/link/hip-linking): >

- [Prescription](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/presription)
- [Personally Identifiable Information (PII) extraction](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/pii-extraction)
- [Document Classification](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/document-classification)
- [Health Insurance Policy](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/health-insurance)
- [Discharge Summary](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/discharge-summary)
- [Medical Scribe](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/medical-scribe)
- [Medical Snomed Coder](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/medical-snomed-coder)
- [Medical Summary](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/medical-summary)
- [Risk Assessment](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/risk-assessment)
- [Symptom Checker](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/symptom-checker)
- [Health Bot](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/technologies/health-bot)
- [Indian Branded Drugs](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/indian_branded_drugs)
- [Indian Treatment Protocols](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/indian_treatment_protocols)
- [Spotlight](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/spotlight)
- [Datasets](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/datasets)
- [Models](https://developer.eka.care/eka-medai/models)

## SDKs

- [Ekascribe](https://developer.eka.care/SDKs/android/ekascribe)
- [Medical Records](https://developer.eka.care/SDKs/android/medical-records)
- [Eka Care TS SDK](https://developer.eka.care/SDKs/web-sdk/getting-started): TS sdk for Eka care APIs, has the following modules built in appointments, patients, medicationSearch and health assessment. with full TypeScript support and TS based autocomplete on `payload`, `fns`, return `responses`.
- [Python SDK: ekacare](https://developer.eka.care/SDKs/backend/ekapython-sdk): A python sdk for ekacare backend
- [EkaCare Webhook SDK](https://developer.eka.care/SDKs/backend/webhook-sdk): SDK for processing EkaCare webhook events
- [Eka Care MCP Server](https://developer.eka.care/SDKs/EkaCare-MCP): Access Curated Medical Knowledge-bases from Claude and OpenAI clients

## AI Tools

- [Overview](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/introduction): Build AI agents with Echo - an open-source, LLM-agnostic framework
- [Quickstart](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/quickstart): Build your first AI agent with Echo in 5 minutes
- [Installation](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/installation): Install Echo - open-source agent framework
- [Configuration](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/configuration): Configure LLMs, tools, and agent settings
- [Agents](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/agents): Build agents with GenericAgent
- [Tools](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/tools): Create base tools, elicitation tools, and use MCP tools
- [LLM Providers](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/llm-providers): Configure OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini
- [Streaming](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/streaming): Real-time response streaming with typed events
- [MCP Integration](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/mcp-integration): Connect to MCP servers for external tools
- [Examples](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/agent-kit/examples): Complete working examples
- [Eka MCP Server](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/mcp-server/introduction): Connect your AI assistant to Eka.care's healthcare platform
- [Supported Tools](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/mcp-server/supported-tools): Complete list of available MCP tools and their capabilities
- [Authentication](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/mcp-server/authentication): Securely connect your AI assistant to Eka.care
- [Custom MCP Client](https://developer.eka.care/ai-tools/mcp-server/integrations/custom-client): Integrate Eka.care MCP into your own application

## CookBook

- [Health Quiz](https://developer.eka.care/cookbook/whats-possible/health-assessment): Building a full stack health quiz app with just 4 Function calls, using eka-care's web SDK
- [Medication Search](https://developer.eka.care/cookbook/whats-possible/medicine-lookup): Building a full stack Building a medication search app using the Eka Care SDK's medication search module.
- [Appointments Management](https://developer.eka.care/cookbook/whats-possible/appointment-management): Building an appointments management app using the Eka Care SDK's appointments module.
- [Patients Management App](https://developer.eka.care/cookbook/whats-possible/patient-management): Building a patients management app using the Eka Care SDK's patients module.
